name: /cost-report --format=json emits machine-parseable JSON with window by and totals keys per H-12
command: mkdir -p rollup/daily && printf '%s' '{"entries":[{"skill":"sync","tokens_in":10,"tokens_out":5}]}' > rollup/daily/2026-05-25.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cost-report.sh" --window=daily --format=json --rollup-dir=rollup >out.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.window==="daily"&&j.by==="skill"&&j.totals?0:1)' && echo json 1>&2
